name: Rotate To Find The Difference
short_description: Have you ever seen "Find the difference" that does not split the screen and needs to be rotated to play? That's it for this game. It tests your memory and may also help you exercise it. The game has 10 themed worlds, and different objects are generated programmatically, so you can play forever.
detailed_description:
There was a moment when the "Find the difference" game idea, which was rotating without splitting the screen, appeared in my mind. I caught it.

Gameplay


  • Rotate the cube to view each group of worlds.
  • Find the difference between each group of worlds.

Game Features/h2]

  • No split screen.
  • Rotating gameplay that tests memory.
  • 10 different themed worlds.
  • Generate different objects programmatically.
  • Endless mode.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Polish, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil
